hero.tagline: I design experiences that are intuitive, meaningful, and human-centered.

work.title: Selected Work
work.subtitle: A collection of projects across research and interaction design.

projects.title: Understanding Mental Health Behaviors
projects.description: A qualitative research study exploring how young adults seek and engage with mental health resources in digital environments.

projects.title: E-commerce Pain Points Discovery
projects.description: Uncovering hidden friction points in the checkout experience through diary studies and contextual inquiry.

projects.title: Finance App Redesign
projects.description: Redesigning a personal finance app to reduce cognitive load and improve daily engagement through clear information hierarchy.

about.title: About Me
about.bio_1: I'm a UX Designer passionate about understanding people and designing solutions that genuinely improve their lives. My work spans user research, information architecture, and interaction design.
about.bio_2: With a background in both qualitative research and interaction design, I bridge the gap between user needs and business goals — turning insights into experiences that resonate.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? I'd love to hear from you.
